params.owner: The address that owns the WETH.
params.spender: The address that is approved to transfer the WETH.

returns._0: The amount of WETH that the spender can transfer on behalf of the owner.

params.guy: The address that is approved to transfer the WETH.
params.wad: The amount that is approved to transfer.

returns._0: True if the approval was successful.

params.src: The address to query the balance of.

returns._0: The balance of the given address.
name_ The name of the token.

params._from: Address of the msg.sender of sendETH on the source chain.

params._chainId: Chain ID of the destination chain.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[EIP section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

returns._0: symbol_ The symbol of the token.

params.dst: The address to transfer the WETH to.
params.wad: The amount of WETH to transfer.

returns._0: True if the transfer was successful.

params.dst: The address to transfer the WETH to.
params.src: The address to transfer the WETH from.
params.wad: The amount of WETH to transfer.

returns._0: True if the transfer was successful.

params.wad: The amount of ETH to withdraw.

userdoc.notice: SuperchainWETH is a version of WETH that can be freely transfrered between chains         within the superchain. SuperchainWETH can be converted into native ETH on chains that         do not use a custom gas token.
